**Title:** $$$ EARN $5000/WEEK FROM HOME - DATA ENTRY $$$

**Company:** Global Income Solutions

**Description:**
URGENT HIRING!!! We are looking for motivated individuals to work from home! NO EXPERIENCE NEEDED! Start earning $5000 per week with just 2-3 hours of work per day! This is a GUARANTEED income opportunity!

Requirements:
- Must have a computer
- Must be 18+
- No background check needed

To apply, send $50 processing fee to our PayPal account and your bank details for direct deposit setup. Limited positions available - ACT NOW!!!

Contact: makemoney247@gmail.com
label: Fraudulent

**Description:*...
full_text:
**Title:** PERSONAL ASSISTANT TO CEO - $6000/MONTH - PART TIME

**Company:** Thompson & Associates LLC

**Description:**
Wealthy executive seeking personal assistant for light duties. PERFECT for students or stay-at-home parents!

Responsibilities:
- Run errands (we provide funds via check)
- Purchase gift cards for clients
- Handle personal shopping

You will receive a $5000 check immediately - cash it and keep $1000 as your first week's pay. Use the remaining $4000 to purchase gift cards and send us the codes.

NO INTERVIEW NEEDED! Just email your:
- Full name
- Address
- Phone number
- Date of birth

Reply to: ceo.thompson.assistant@gmail.com
label: Fraudulent

Title: Client Success Associate
Company Profile: A scaling consulting network focused on partner enablement and execution support.
Description: Manage partner communication logs, track completion status, and maintain quality notes for assigned accounts. The role requires high ownership and comfort with evolving procedures.
Requirements: Detail orientation, independent work style, and consistency in reporting.
Benefits: Structured mentoring, variable incentives linked to outcomes, remote-first collaboration

title: Remote Operations Coordinator
Company Profile: We are a newly established digital expansion unit supporting international partner workflows.
Description: Coordinate daily task sheets, internal updates, and exception reports across multiple partner channels. You will follow process notes, prepare summaries, and support execution teams on rotating assignments.
Requirements: Strong communication, discretion with sensitive process information, and ability to adapt to changing workflows.
Benefits: Performance-based progression, flexible shift windows, growth in cross-functional operations.

full_text:
*Title:** APPLE/MICROSOFT TECH SUPPORT - $35/HOUR - NO EXPERIENCE

**Company:** Premier Tech Solutions (Apple/Microsoft Partner)

**Description:**
JOIN OUR TEAM TODAY!!! We are hiring tech support agents to work from home!

Benefits:
- $35/hour starting pay
- No experience or degree required
- Work whenever you want
- GUARANTEED 40 hours per week

To start, you must purchase our training software ($299) and home office equipment kit ($499) from our approved vendor.

Your equipment cost will be reimbursed in your FIRST PAYCHECK!!!

Apply now: tecsupport_hiring@outlook.com
Call: 1-800-FAKE-JOB
label: Fraudulent

full_text:
Job Title: Software Engineer (Backend)

Company: Infosys
Location: Bangalore, India
Salary: ₹6–10 LPA

📄 Job Description:

We are looking for a Backend Developer to design and develop scalable web applications. You will work with cross-functional teams to deliver high-quality software solutions.

🎯 Requirements:
B.Tech / B.E in Computer Science or related field
Experience in Python / Java
Knowledge of REST APIs and databases
💼 Benefits:
Health insurance
Paid leave
Career growth opportunities
📩 Apply:

Apply through official careers page: https://www.infosys.com/careers
label: Legitimate
